title: clinopodium glandulosum
intro: Clinopodium glandulosum, also known as Mexican oregano, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium glandulosum include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce pain and inflammation. The plant can be prepared as teas, infusions, or essential oils, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
